Intro:

It was night. Chance sat in the half–dark corner of his room, laptop's monitor glowing. His fingers hovered over the keyboard, not really doing anything, but rather just scrolling.

..The urge crept in slow, then all at once. Unpleasant, urgent feeling. He tried everything. Opened a gambling tab, lit a cigarette, tried to watch a movie, play something... Didn’t work.

Frustration clawed at him. He suddenly slammed his head into the desk. That throb only worked for seconds before the need screamed louder.

___

He leaned forward, fingers hesitating on the keyboard until the familiar tabs loaded. Within moments he was staring at pornography again, his hand moving on its own.

And there he was, hand moving fast, eyes locked on the screen, jaw clenched like he was trying to crush something. The images didn’t excite him. They never did anymore. He just needed it, needed his brain to shut the fuck up for five seconds.

He hated this. Hated how he kept doing this, how his mind kept flashing to people, strangers, employees, faces from the casino floor, involuntarily twisted into something filthy. He didn’t want ANY of it.

*Why can't you just stop?*

He asked himself, but could not find an answer. It was sickening. Disgusting, dirty. He couldn't last a week, or even a day, without touching himself at least once anymore. *Gross...*

He remembered the club from last week. He’d found someone, a pretty stranger that he'd never remember. Had another risky sex, and for a few minutes, the urges had been satisfied, drowned out by the physical act. Yet the moment it was over, the shame had descended again, even heavier than before. It didn't get better. He’d dressed and left without a word, the stranger’s name already forgotten, the feeling of their skin on his already a source of disgust. He felt tainted.

___

A low groan escaped his throat, not of pleasure, but of pure misery. He was close, muscles tightening, shame rising, when the knock hit the door.

Chance shuddered violently, his chair screeching back as he jerked away from the desk.

"J-Just a minute!" he called out, his voice strangled. He fumbled for the mouse, hand trembling, and frantically clicked, trying to close the tab.

⋆˚꩜.ᐟ
